summary: Iteration 24: Full E2E testing of Service feature (manual services + 3% service fee reports). Backend: 16/16 pytest passed (100%). Frontend: /service page form + validation + list refresh + delete role-visibility all working; /laporan tab-service shows 4 stat cards, stacked chart, fee & manual tables, export CSV, with correct grand totals; regression of Pengeluaran and all sidebar menus PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2125 lines — consider splitting into modules (routers/services.py, routers/reports.py) for maintainability.
SERVICE_FEE_PCT and service fee validation logic could be extracted into a helper for DRY.
GET /api/services returns up to 2000 records unpaginated; consider adding pagination for larger datasets.
DELETE /api/services/{id} returns 404 only on not-found; there is no soft-delete/audit for financial data. Consider audit trail (already logged via log_activity — good).
seed_data_creation: Test services were auto-created during pytest (TEST_iter24 prefix) and UI (E2E test antar-jemput UI). All test data cleaned up after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 fully PASS. Services endpoint (/api/services POST/GET/DELETE), /api/reports/service-revenue, and updated /api/reports/daily (with 'service' column) and /api/reports/summary (with pendapatan_service_hari_ini/bulan_ini) all validated. Frontend testids used: svc-kategori, svc-deskripsi, svc-nominal, svc-tamu, svc-kamar, svc-hp, svc-metode, svc-submit, svc-total-today, svc-total-all, svc-delete-{id}, tab-service, export-service-fee, export-service-manual, svc-fee-total, svc-manual-total.

e2e_verification.created_service_via_UI: E2E test antar-jemput UI, nominal 75000, kategori Transportasi, metode QRIS
